name: Embry Holdings Limited
summary: Embry Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, designs, researches, develops, manufactures, trades in, and sells ladies brassieres, panties, swimwear, and sleepwear. The company sells its lingerie products primarily under the EMBRY FORM, FANDECIE, COMFIT, E-BRA, IVU, IADORE, and LIZA CHENG brands. It also holds trademark and invests in properties. As of December 31, 2020, the company had 1,398 retail outlets comprising 1,177 concessionary counters and 221 retail stores in Mainland China, Hong Kong, and Macau. It also operates an online shop. The company was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Kwai Chung, Hong Kong. Embry Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Harmonious World Limited.
